[30;1m76 | [0m[35m                        if (img && node instanceof HTMLImageElement && node.parentNode) {[0m
[30;1m77 | [0m[35m                            var parentNode = node.parentNode;[0m

[30;1m79 | [0m[35m                            parentNode.replaceChild(clonedChild, node);[0m

[30;1m33 | [0m[35m### Usage ###[0m
[30;1m34 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m35 | [0m[35mThe html2canvas library utilizes `Promise`s and expects them to be available in the global context. [0m
[30;1m36 | [0m[35msupport [older browsers](http://caniuse.com/#search=promise) that do not natively support `Promise`s[0m
[30;1m37 | [0m[35m[es6-promise](https://github.com/jakearchibald/es6-promise) before including `html2canvas`.[0m
[30;1m38 | [0m[35m[0m
